data.title: Analysts weigh benefits, risks associated with artificial intelligence at Quinnipiac University's Global Asset Management Education Forum XV
data.description: On March 24, 2026, a panel titled "How AI is Revolutionizing Business and Operations in Asset Management" took place during the second day of Quinnipiac University's 15th Global Asset Management Education (GAME) Forum in New York. The discussion centered around the impact of artificial intelligence on the asset management industry. This session attracted a significant audience, with over X attendees present to delve into the ways AI is reshaping strategies and operations within this sector. The insights shared during the panel shed light on the potential for AI to drive efficiencies and innovation in asset management, highlighting its role in shaping the future of the industry.

data.title: BayCare Leader Brings Varied Background, Education to Mission & Ethics Role
data.description: In Clearwater, Florida on March 24, 2026, Dr. Jojo Dyachim was appointed as the Vice President of Mission & Ethics at BayCare Health System. Dr. Dyachim brings over ten years of experience within the health system, previously serving as the director of the same department he now leads. His expertise and leadership will play a crucial role in ensuring the ethical and mission-driven practices of the organization.

data.title: Boston Arts Academy Foundation's 2026 HONORS Spotlights Trailblazers Shaping the Future of Arts, Design, and Civic Leadership
data.description: Kim Driscoll, the Lieutenant Governor, has been appointed as the Honorary Chair for an upcoming event in Boston. Mark Lev, President of Fenway Sports Management, will be honored with a Lifetime Achievement Award for his significant contributions across various industries. The event, organized by the Boston Arts Academy Foundation, a key 501(c)(3) charitable organization, is scheduled for March 24, 2026, in Boston. This award ceremony aims to celebrate Lev's transformative impact and success.

data.title: International Harrington Prize Jointly Awarded to Drs. Arul Chinnaiyan and Charles Sawyers
data.description: The recipient of the prestigious 2026 Harrington Prize for Innovation in Medicine, known for its groundbreaking work in the field of prostate cancer diagnosis and treatment, is Dr. Arul Chinnaiyan, MD, PhD. This award was announced in Cleveland on March 24, 2026. This marks the thirteenth consecutive year the prize has been given out, highlighting the significance of Dr. Chinnaiyan's contributions.

data.title: SHARx Analyzes TrumpRx: Transparency on Drug Costs Doesn't Resolve Pricing and Access Gatekeeping
data.description: The recent debut of the Trump administration's TrumpRx drug platform has sparked a fresh examination of prescription drug expenses. Apart from the initial surprise at the high costs, the intricacies of drug pricing and accessibility primarily stem from the convoluted nature of pharmacy benefit manager (PBM) systems. data.description: Important findings from a recent study revealed that adults suffering from PTSD and depression saw significant improvement after undergoing a unique sequential bilateral TMS treatment from Family Care Center. IRAN TURNS BACK CONTAINER SHIP IN STRAIT OF HORMUZ The container ship Selen was stopped for lacking proper permission to transit the Strait of Hormuz, according to IRGC Navy commander Alireza Tangsiri. Passage requires full coordination with Iran’s maritime authorities.

data.title: Monarch Expands Nationwide Footprint, Names Anna Lohrfink CEO Amid Rapid Physician Adoption
data.description: A company based in New York, Monarch, specializing in aiding women’s health physicians in establishing independent membership-based practices, recently disclosed the appointment of Anna Lohrfink, one of its co-founders, as the Chief Executive Officer. Meanwhile, fellow co-founder and initial CEO Hani Elias will assume the role of Chairman of the Board to oversee the company's future direction and expansion efforts. This leadership shift is occurring amid rising interest from physicians and patients for sustainable healthcare models, indicating a growing demand in the industry.

data.title: Emagine Solutions Technology Wins ACA Grant, Announces Open Application for Groundbreaking Arizona Maternal Health Study
data.description: In Tucson, Arizona, Emagine Solutions Technology has been granted a $250,000 award by the Arizona Commerce Authority (ACA) through its WearTech Applied Research Center. The center, established in 2019, aims at supporting innovative projects in health, biomedical, and technology sectors to attract investment. Emagine Solutions Technology, a maternal health innovator, will benefit from this funding, which is intended to de-risk investments in cutting-edge technologies. The WearTech Applied Research Center works closely with Arizona universities and has successfully backed numerous projects since its launch.

data.title: In HelloNation, Construction Expert Jovana Villanueva of Easton, PA, Shares Key Strategies for Affordable Housing Projects
data.description: In Easton, Pennsylvania, a report dated March 24, 2026 reveals a discussion on the key factors enabling affordable housing construction projects to remain on schedule despite limited budgets and stringent timeframes. The article, authored by HelloNation, showcases insights from Jovana Villanueva of JV Construction & Consulting LLC. Villanueva delves into the strategies that contribute to the success of these projects, emphasizing the critical aspects that ensure their timely completion within cost constraints.

data.title: Cambio Roasters® Named to Fast Company's 2026 Annual List of the World's Most Innovative Companies
data.description: In Charleston, South Carolina on March 24, 2026, Cambio Roasters, a coffee company aiming to eradicate single-use plastic K-Cup® pods, has been recognized by Fast Company among the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026. Their commitment to "Great Taste, Less Waste" has garnered attention, reflecting a growing trend towards sustainability in the industry.

data.title: ROTH STAFFING COMPANIES NAMED TO CLEARLYRATED'S 2026 BEST STAFFING FIRMS FOR WOMEN LIST
data.description: Roth Staffing Companies, a prominent staffing firm based in Orange, California, has demonstrated dedication to promoting equity and progression for female-identifying employees. The company has secured a spot on the prestigious list of the 2026 Best Staffing Firms for Women. This recognition showcases their commitment to providing opportunities for women in the workforce.
